data.name: 性癮辣妹COS誘惑
data.detailed_description:
■讓辣妹成為順從宅男的穿衣玩物！
只是用雞雞來上一發就讓高等種姓的辣妹成為你的所有！色情的身體加上宅男趣味全開的動漫COS裝，色情COS服，隨你喜歡盡情配種！讓辣妹成為你理想的懷孕人偶！

■對宅男溫柔以及對宅男很兇的雙倍辣妹玩物！
明明是辣妹，卻有著宅男趣味的溫柔辣妹【希星】，鄙視宅男，不斷攻擊而來的辣妹【繪戀】，用雞雞讓兩人屈服，成為你的玩物！讓就算類型不同，但色情的身體還是不變的兩人成為如你所願的玩物！

■女人的忠誠全開！
用雞雞讓她們知道男人和女人的立場的不同後，下跪，卑劣的姿勢，諂媚雞雞的COSPLAY等等如你所願！辣妹們對你和你的雞雞表現出絕對的忠誠， 不斷臣服於你！

■讓辣妹的色情身體懷孕！
在COSPLAY懷孕做愛後，她們當然懷孕了！你也能享受到辣妹們的色情身體懷孕後的色情場景！

■辣妹們的色情台詞全聲線！
可以享受對宅男溫柔以及對宅男很兇的辣妹們迷上雞雞，發出狗叫般的下流叫聲！享受淫語和諂媚台詞，高潮時的台詞以及受精時的台詞吧！

💖官方漢化版
💖高清16:9和4:3圖質。
💖幾小時的內容。
💖所有美女帶有日文語音。
💖帶有角色動態。
💖15個與辣妹H的劇情
💖帶有收藏展覽。


「性癮辣妹COS誘惑」由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由cherry kiss 櫻桃社正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

data.short_description: 每個人在心中都有一個特殊的動漫 Waifu。如果你的 Waifu 形像是天使長相惡魔身材，你會怎麼做？當然是讓她們瘋狂！ ！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Kinky Cosplay: Gyarus Gone Wild
data.detailed_description:
The absolute apex of fantasy, nothing can beat the impeccable illustrated elegance of a Waifu. Our protagonist is blessed and cursed with the crushing knowledge that the flesh and blood manifestations of his revered waifus are unobtainable hotties that wouldn't give him the time of day, until... One day the stars have aligned and one of the girls of his dreams not only has seen his anime collection, but is into it! Now, she is in his room, he can smell her perfume, see the way her smile shines, her cheeks flush with excitement, the way her hair bounces as she slips and falls?! In one 'lucky pervert moment' with this ethereal beauty on the ground before him, legs akimbo its simply too much for the guy and his pent-up lust explodes!

Drive that gyaru wild with a fucking she'll never forget! Once you've got one hooked, completing the set is as easy as cream pie, as neither of these two gals can withstand the onslaught of degenerate pleasure a horny backed-up weeb can unleash! Now with a set of cum addicted gyarus at your disposal, live out all the dirty scenarios from the depraved doujins starring the 2D counterparts of the very real, and very horny gyarus. Clad them in kinky cosplay, slap on some leather collars, and brand them with sexy tattoos. Anything and everything that you can dish out, they'll eagerly lap up!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • Elen and Kirara are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue!
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • 15 scenes of mind melting sex to drive these gyarus truly wild!

Kinky Cosplay: Gyarus Gone Wild Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Everyone has a special place in their heart for a special anime Waifu. What would you do if the splitting image of your Waifu was a sexy gyaru with a killer bod? Drive them wild with your huge cock of course!!
data.supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America
